- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)

## Target branch

<!-- Feature/fix PRs must target `development`. Promotion PRs use the promotion template. -->

- [ ] This PR targets **`development`** (feature / fix / chore)
- [ ] This is a **promotion** PR (use `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/promotion.md`)

## Related issues

<!-- Required when fixing or implementing tracked work -->

## Project board

- [ ] Issue is on [GyroERP Development](https://github.com/orgs/GyroERP/projects/3)
- [ ] Card moved to **In Progress** / **In review** as appropriate

See the full workflow: [PROJECT.md](https://github.com/GyroERP/.github/blob/main/PROJECT.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] I branched from **`development`** (not `main`)
- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/<issue#>-name` or `fix/<issue#>-name`
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [BRANCHING.md](../BRANCHING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the GyroERP Community License terms
- [ ] I have not committed secrets (`.env`, keys, credentials)
- [ ] Database migrations are included (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python manage.py test`)
- [ ] `python manage.py check` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
